sources.title: Portfolio Manager (PM) in Asset Management
claims: PM is the final investment decision maker with P&L responsibility.
PM defines investment strategy, allocates capital, and manages portfolio risk within mandate.
PM collaborates closely with Analysts, Traders, Risk, and Compliance.

sources.title: Research Analyst in Asset Management
claims: Analyst conducts company analysis, financial modeling, and investment idea generation.
Analyst produces investment notes, earnings previews/reviews, and valuation models.
Analyst supports PM decisions but does not hold final investment authority.

sources.title: Risk Manager in Asset Management
claims: Risk Manager monitors market, credit, liquidity, and operational risk exposures.
Risk Manager runs VaR, stress tests, and limit breach reports.
Risk Manager acts as a control function independent of portfolio management.

sources.title: Fund Accounting in Asset Management
claims: Fund Accounting calculates NAV, settlement, and reconciliation.
Fund Accounting handles corporate actions, dividend processing, and external audit support.
Fund Accounting is often the boundary between asset manager and fund administrator.

sources.title: Product Manager in Asset Management
claims: Product Manager designs fund products, structures, and regulatory filings.
Product Manager bridges investment management and distribution/sales.
Product Manager monitors competitor products and client demand trends.

sources.title: Institutional Sales in Asset Management
claims: Institutional Sales drives AUM growth by acquiring and retaining clients.
Sales works with PMs, Product, and Client Service to craft proposals and RFPs.
Sales performance is measured by flows, win rates, and client coverage.

sources.title: Alternative Investment Roles
claims: Alternative investment firms add Deal Sourcing, Due Diligence, Operating Partner, and Valuation roles.
Alternative investment lifecycle includes sourcing, diligence, structuring, investment, management, and exit.
IR/Fundraising manages LP relationships and capital commitments.

sources.title: Generic Asset Management Job Posting Aggregator
claims: Generic job postings can list many titles but lack contextual role analysis.
